/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/server.dir/main.cpp.o -o server   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libpqxx/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libpqxx/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/lib -framework Foundation -framework Security -lpqxx -lpq
